top_signals.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - June 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee is responsible for making decisions about Bank Rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
top_signals.summary: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Warehouse cramming is about to begin — Freightonomics
top_signals.summary:
On this episode of Freightonomics, Zach Strickland and Anthony Smith talk about the need to cram for warehouse space with Zac Rogers from Colorado State University.

The post Warehouse cramming is about to begin — Freightonomics appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UN watchdog says it has access to Iran's nuclear sites after interim peace deal
top_signals.summary: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why the Northeast is quietly running out of diesel
top_signals.summary:
Diesel inventories on the East Coast are at record lows. Truckers are spooked by the vanishing stocks and soaring rates.

The post Why the Northeast is quietly running out of diesel appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years
top_signals.summary:
A source familiar with the 96-year-old company said he is unsure whether CFL will file Chapter 7 or “liquidate outside of bankruptcy,” but that the LTL carrier has no plans to reorganize.

The post Exclusive: Central Freight Lines to shut down after 96 years appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: A Chip Wreck in Markets: Markets Snapshot
top_signals.summary: Micron's earnings numbers came at a delicate moment for the AI industry. Shares of chipmakers and other technology companies had been hammered in recent days on fears that a spending boom was faltering. Questions remain on whether the tech sector can mitigate the boom-and-bust cycles that have characterized the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The ‘ingenious strategy’ behind most truckers’ least favorite week of the year: International Roadcheck
top_signals.summary:
Inspection blitzes frustrate truck drivers. But economists found that the International Roadcheck Week boosts overall road safety.

The post The ‘ingenious strategy’ behind most truckers’ least favorite week of the year: International Roadcheck appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Project44 acquires ClearMetal to strengthen predictive tools
top_signals.summary:
“Their team construct is fundamentally different. When you look at their data science, machine learning and computer science background, they are best in class.”

top_signals.title: Joint Statement by High Representative Kallas and Commissioners Síkela and Lahbib on the devastating earthquakes in Venezuela
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Brussels, 25 Jun 2026 The European Union conveys its condolences to the families and loved ones of the victims of the devastating earthquakes that struck Venezuela. At this difficult moment, the European Union expresses its solidarity with the people of Venezuela and with all those engaged in rescue and relief operations.
